sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85495" key="polu/fqoos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολύ-φθοος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, epith. of a day at Delphi, <sense id="n85495.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">on which the oracle was much consulted,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.292f</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
